title: Inspector Chingum
desc: Chingum, an honest and diligent police inspector, combats crime in an attempt to keep his city safe, while also helping his friends Motu and Patlu overcome various obstacles.

title: Inspector Chingum
desc: Chingum is the police in charge of shantiwood who has a heart of gold and helps everyone who asks for help. his action oriented misadventures lead the character to be comical.

title: Pokemon
desc: A Pokemon master journeys worldwide with friends, capturing and training pocket monsters while facing challenges and adventures along the way.

title: Ejen Ali
desc: Animated action-adventure following Ali, a teenage agent who takes on missions using advanced technology, courage, and intelligence to protect his world from hidden threats.

title: Chuck Chicken
desc: Chuck Chicken, a clumsy bird-turned-hero, uses a magical feather to protect Rocky Perch Island. His comic battles against villains teach teamwork, courage, and responsibility.

title: Pokemon Advanced
desc: On his 10th birthday, Ash begins his Pokemon journey with a surprising Pikachu. He battles tough gyms, supported by Brock, Misty, and Bulbasaur, Squirtle, and Charmander.
